meaning: adv.漂亮地,献殷勤地,勇敢地
examples: He bowed and gallantly kissed my hand.
The town responded gallantly to the war.
He allegedly dispatched (rather gallantly) homicide detectives when one girlfriend lost her mobile phone.
But on he played, gallantly, valiantly, fighting on for the Fighting Irish, remaining undefeated against adversity.
